app_identity.name: Dossier
app_identity.description: AI-powered video indexing and retrieval application
app_identity.vibe: Professional, precise, technical yet artistic. A command center for video archives.
app_identity.logo_concept: A sharp, minimalist geometric 'D' that subtly resembles a play button or timeline marker, using the active accent color.

rules: No full-screen gradients. The application relies on solid colors, sharp borders, and distinct panel separations.
Use the selected accent color exclusively for primary actions, active states, and AI jump markers.
Surfaces must have a 1px solid border matching the theme's border color.

headings.usage: Main application headers, panel titles, empty state headings.

body.usage: UI text, dense settings, folder tree items, general metadata.

monospace.usage: Timestamps, AI generated jump markers, file paths, specific code/query chunks.

rules: Include a top titlebar/toolbar area spanning the full width (like native apps).
Panels must be separated by 1px draggable borders.
When a panel is collapsed, show a thin vertical strip with a toggle icon to reopen it.

video_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4
video_grid.rules: Must fill the Center Panel area and support scrolling independently.

explorer_tree.visuals: Small padding (py-1 px-2), text-sm. Folder icons toggle between open/closed states. Chevrons on the left.
explorer_tree.interactions: Hover state highlights the row. Active state applies a subtle background tint and left border in accent color.
explorer_tree.status_indicators: Videos in the tree have a 6px circular dot indicator (Yellow=processing, Green=completed, Red=error, Gray=unprocessed) next to the filename.

video_card.visuals: Sharp or slightly rounded corners (max 6px). 1px border. No heavy drop shadow (use inner borders or subtle ambient shadow).
video_card.thumbnail: Aspect ratio 16:9, relative container, overlay with duration badge in bottom right (bg-black/80 font-mono text-xs).
video_card.metadata: Title truncated to 1 line, Date/Size in text-xs text-secondary.
video_card.hover_state: Slight brightness increase on thumbnail. A centered 'Play' button overlay fades in over the thumbnail.

video_player.visuals: Fills the center workspace. Control bar at the bottom with solid dark background.
video_player.timeline: Custom timeline track. Must render 'AI Jump Markers' as vertical 2px bars along the track using the active accent color.
video_player.subtitles: Overlay on video. Text must be white, font-bold, with heavy text-shadow or a translucent black background strip for legibility.
video_player.controls: Play/Pause, Skip Back/Forward, Volume, Fullscreen, and a 'View Transcript' toggle.

ai_chat_bubble.user_bubble: Aligned right. Background surface color, text-primary.
ai_chat_bubble.ai_bubble: Aligned left. No background, transparent, but has a 2px left-border in the accent color.
ai_chat_bubble.timestamp_links: Rendered within AI text as inline block tags. Font-mono, text-xs, text-accent, bg-accent/10, px-1 rounded. Hoverable and clickable.

onboarding_modal.visuals: Fixed center screen. Background is a heavy glassmorphic blur (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40). The modal itself is solid surface color, sharp borders.
onboarding_modal.steps: 1. Welcome & Theme Selection (Skippable), 2. Server URL & Key (Required), 3. Video Root Folder (Required).
onboarding_modal.controls: Next/Back buttons in footer. 'Skip' where applicable.

settings_row.structure: Flex container, justify-between, items-center, border-b border-border py-4
settings_row.right: Control component (Switch, Select, Input, Color Swatches).

visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Rely on 1px borders for structural separation. Only use heavy shadows for modals/dialogs.
visual_enhancers.borders: Sharp edges or minimal radii (4px to 6px maximum) to maintain the 'desktop app' feel.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for overlay modals (onboarding, dialogs) to obscure the background. NEVER use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or panels.

motion.panel_resize: Smooth dragging, snap to minimum widths.
motion.hover_states: Fast transitions (150ms). Focus on opacity and subtle background color shifts.
motion.dialogs: Scale up slightly (0.95 to 1) and fade in (opacity 0 to 1) over 200ms.

guidelines: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Ensure color contrast is maintained, especially for AI jump markers on the timeline.
Keyboard shortcuts should be visually hinted in menus or tooltips (e.g., Cmd+P).

video_thumbnails.description: Aerial photo of brown mountains (mock video 1)
Silhouette of mountains during night (mock video 2)

rules: Build a Single Page App simulating a desktop application. Do not build a scrolling marketing page.
Do not use default generic fonts like Inter or Roboto. Integrate Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Apply the theme variable strategy to allow switching between the 6 accent colors dynamically via CSS variables.
Never use full transparent backgrounds where content overlap can occur.
Add data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based) to all buttons, inputs, tabs, and interactive elements.
Use Lucide-react or Phosphor Icons for the iconography.
For tooltips and toasts, use Shadcn/Sonner.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop'. Make it feel like a professional tool like VS Code or DaVinci Resolve, but uniquely Dossier.
Do NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Do not center-align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is forbidden).
Never use AI assistant emoji characters (🤖, 🧠) for icons. Use clean SVG icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Exclude transform from 'all' transitions.
Ensure the UI feels dense enough for productivity but clean and well-structured.
